opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole body is aching terribly, I'm burning up, and I feel too weak to even get out of a chair.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on out of nowhere this afternoon and got bad fast — I've never ached like this and I'm frightened it's something serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: this afternoon — I was completely fine this morning
symptom_narrative.duration: about 4 hours and it's been getting worse the whole time
symptom_narrative.character: deep aching all through my muscles, and my joints ache a bit too; I feel hot and shivery and wrung out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the muscle pain is severe — I can barely move and I feel wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — both arms, both legs, my back, it's the same on both sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, no let-up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really, sitting still is a little less painful
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, trying to stand up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling feverish and weak; no cough, no sore throat, no runny nose, no burning when I pass water, no tummy pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can hardly get out of the chair and I'm scared of falling — I live on my own

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about managing and about falling because of how weak she feels

objective_data_offered.value: moving very slowly and stiffly on video, wincing when she shifts in the chair, looks tired and unwell
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression from a video call, not an examination

objective_data_offered.value: no rash that she can see anywhere on her skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-inspection over video; not a clinician skin examination
